Account.Name: Reimbursement Grant Revenue
Account.Description: Grant or contract funds allocated to Franklin County housing reimbursements

Account.Name: Emergency Housing Reimbursements
Account.Description: Motel and temporary housing reimbursements for tenant relocation cases

Account.Name: Volunteer Travel Reimbursements
Account.Description: Mileage and fuel reimbursements for coalition volunteer support

Account.Name: Food & Essentials Reimbursements
Account.Description: Food and essential supply reimbursements for supported households

Account.Name: Reimbursement Clearing
Account.Description: Clearing account for approved reimbursement payments

Account.Name: Accounts Receivable
Account.Description: Pending reimbursement documentation awaiting review or clarification

Account.Name: Accounts Payable
Account.Description: Outstanding reimbursements not yet approved for payment

Account.Name: Duplicate Review Reserve
Account.Description: Held amount for duplicate-flagged uploads and repeated reimbursement trails

Account.Name: Document Reconciliation
Account.Description: Administrative review for missing dates and mixed household documents

Account.Name: Retained Earnings
Account.Description: Accumulated net assets for the reimbursement workspace

Account.Name: Relocation Transportation Reimbursements
Account.Description: Truck rental and relocation transportation reimbursements

Account.Name: Utility and Deposit Reimbursements
Account.Description: Utility deposit and security deposit reimbursements subject to intake limits
